content: I'm {{Sohaib Mokhliss}}, a {{Computer & Network Engineering}} student focused on {{full-stack development}}, {{DevOps}}, and {{security-first engineering}}.
I build applications and systems with {{clean architecture}}, {{automation}}, and {{practical security}} in mind.
I hold a {{Specialized Technician}} diploma in Cybersecurity from ISTA and have gained hands-on experience through internships at {{HPS}}, {{CIH}}, {{ITPay}}, and {{BMCE}}.
My path started with {{security assessment}} and {{penetration testing}}, then expanded into {{application development}}, {{CI/CD}}, and platform engineering.
Current focus: {{full-stack development}}, {{backend systems}}, {{CI/CD automation}}, and the day-to-day work needed to keep platforms {{reliable}}, {{repeatable}}, and {{secure}}.
I especially enjoy working across {{product development}}, {{Linux environments}}, and container-based infrastructure while keeping secure design in view.
You can connect with me on LinkedIn or review my work on GitHub.
For internships, collaboration, or freelance opportunities, reach me at sohaibmokhliss@gmail.com.
